title: jugeni notes audit log entry (v1)
description: Append-only audit log entry for knowledge-atom (note) lifecycle events. One JSON object per line in JSONL format. Location on disk: <repo>/.jugeni/notes/audit.jsonl. Notes are factual/architectural atoms separate from decisions (which have lifecycle); this stream is shape-similar to decisions audit but tracks ADD/ARCHIVE only. Hash chain fields (prev_hash, entry_hash) are roadmap (v2).

ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone offset (local time preserved). Same shape as decisions audit.

action.description: Lifecycle event. 'add' creates a new note (notes are immutable after add). 'archive' marks a note as no longer authoritative without deleting it (preserves provenance). Notes do NOT have proposed/accepted/locked lifecycle — they're additive knowledge atoms, not decisions.

note.description: Note identifier. Format: N-YYYY-MM-DD-NNN where YYYY-MM-DD is creation date and NNN is monotonic counter within that day (zero-padded to at least 3 digits).

detail.description: Note kind classifier. Stable enum used at write-time, free-form in schema for forward-compatibility. Current values in production: 'pattern', 'architecture', 'reflection', 'hypothesis', 'anti-pattern'. New kinds may be added without schema bump.
